basics.description: **Note:** Please refer to the following before installing the solution: • Review the solution [Release Notes](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/tree/master/Solutions/CheckPoint%20Harmony%20Email%20and%20Collaboration/ReleaseNotes.md) • There may be [known issues](https://aka.ms/sentinelsolutionsknownissues) pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing. The [CloudGuard](https://sc1.checkpoint.com/documents/CloudGuard_Dome9/Documentation/Overview/CloudGuard-CSPM-Introduction.htm?cshid=help_center_documentation) data connector enables the ingestion of security events from the CloudGuard API into Microsoft Sentinel™, using Microsoft Sentinel’s Codeless Connector Platform. The connector supports DCR-based [ingestion time transformations](https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/azure-monitor/logs/custom-logs-overview) which parses incoming security event data into custom columns. This pre-parsing process eliminates the need for query-time parsing, resulting in improved performance for data queries **Data Connectors:** 1, **Analytic Rules:** 1, **Hunting Queries:** 5, **Playbooks:** 1 [Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel](https://aka.ms/azuresentinel) | [Learn more about Solutions](https://aka.ms/azuresentinelsolutionsdoc)

metadata.hidden: Hiding location, we get it from the log analytics workspace

basics.name: getLAWorkspace
basics.toolTip: This filters by workspaces that exist in the Resource Group selected

basics.name: workspace
basics.label: Workspace
basics.toolTip: This dropdown will list only workspace that exists in the Resource Group selected

options.text: This Solution installs the data connector for CheckPoint Harmony Email and Collaboration. You can get CheckPoint Harmony Email and Collaboration data in your Microsoft Sentinel workspace. After installing the solution, configure and enable this data connector by following guidance in Manage solution view.

link.label: Learn more about connecting data sources

options.text: This solution installs the following analytic rule templates. After installing the solution, create and enable analytic rules in Manage solution view.
Fetch phishing emails that are pending action
This solution installs the following hunting queries. After installing the solution, run these hunting queries to hunt for threats in Manage solution view.
Get event breakdown per user This hunting query depends on CheckpointHECConnection data connector (CheckpointHEC_CL Parser or Table)
Event type count break down This hunting query depends on CheckpointHECConnection data connector (CheckpointHEC_CL Parser or Table)
Search for emails detected as spam This hunting query depends on CheckpointHECConnection data connector (CheckpointHEC_CL Parser or Table)
Get phishing email count per user This hunting query depends on CheckpointHECConnection data connector (CheckpointHEC_CL Parser or Table)
Search for DLP detections This hunting query depends on CheckpointHECConnection data connector (CheckpointHEC_CL Parser or Table)

This solution installs the Playbook templates to help implement your Security Orchestration, Automation and Response (SOAR) operations. After installing the solution, these will be deployed under Playbook Templates in the Automation blade in Microsoft Sentinel. They can be configured and managed from the Manage solution view in Content Hub.
